# Disclaimer

## Purpose

vowifi-go is intended for personal learning, technical research, interoperability
experiments, and functional testing. It is not recommended for direct use in
production environments, emergency communications, regulated deployments, or
critical business systems unless the user has independently reviewed, tested,
and accepted the associated risks.

## Independent Project

vowifi-go is a third-party independent open implementation of the VoHive VoWiFi
runtime boundary. It is not affiliated with, endorsed by, authorized by, or
jointly developed with any mobile network operator, device vendor, chipset
vendor, SIM vendor, ePDG provider, IMS provider, or official closed-source
VoWiFi implementation.

The project does not claim to reproduce every behavior, feature, compatibility
mode, certification path, or operational guarantee of the official
closed-source implementation.

## Development Status

This project is still under active development and is not feature-complete.
The current code does not yet implement the complete feature set of the
official closed-source implementation. APIs, behavior, compatibility
assumptions, and supported scenarios may change as the implementation evolves.

## Compliance and Acceptable Use

Users are solely responsible for ensuring that any use of this project complies
with applicable laws, regulations, telecom operator terms, SIM and device
agreements, spectrum/network policies, and local emergency-service requirements.

Do not use this project for illegal, abusive, unauthorized, fraudulent, or
network-disruptive activity. Any legal, contractual, operational, or financial
consequences caused by use or misuse of this project are the user's sole
responsibility.

## Operational Risk

VoWiFi, IMS, ePDG, SIM authentication, routing, TUN/XFRM, SRTP, and related
network features can affect device connectivity, service availability, billing,
privacy, and emergency-service behavior. Users should test in controlled
environments and avoid relying on this project for safety-critical or
availability-critical communications.

## No Warranty

This software is provided "as is", without warranties or conditions of any kind,
express or implied, including but not limited to warranties of merchantability,
fitness for a particular purpose, non-infringement, compatibility, security, or
availability.

The authors and contributors are not liable for any direct, indirect,
incidental, special, consequential, exemplary, or other damages arising from
use, misuse, deployment, inability to use, data loss, device malfunction,
network interruption, service disruption, account impact, or compliance issues
related to this project.
